rules.name: Ambushers
rules.fullDesc: All Infantry models in your army gain Infiltrate. If they already have Infiltrate they gain Outflank instead.

rules.name: Indirect Tactics
rules.fullDesc: All Infantry models in your army cannot Claim or Contest Objective Markers in your Deployment Zone.

rules.name: Average
rules.fullDesc: This army is fielded exactly as presented in this Codex with no changes.

rules.name: Lost Home World
rules.fullDesc: Models in your army count as half a model for Contesting Objective Markers and suffer Ld-1.

rules.name: Swordwind
rules.fullDesc: All models in your army may reroll 1s To Hit. Models that can already reroll 1s To Hit instead reroll 2s To Hit.

rules.name: Lost Home World
rules.fullDesc: Models in your army count as half a model for Contesting Objective Markers and suffer Ld-1.

rules.name: Reliance on the Dead
rules.fullDesc: Wraith models in your army gain Objective Secured.

rules.name: Isolationists
rules.fullDesc: All infantry models in your army gain Stealth. If they already had Stealth, they swap it for Shroud instead.

rules.name: Lost Home World
rules.fullDesc: Models in your army count as half a model for Contesting Objective Markers and suffer Ld-1.

rules.name: Wild Riders
rules.fullDesc: Models with Steed may be taken as a Troop Choice.

rules.name: Reckless Assault
rules.fullDesc: Models with Steed that Declare a Charge against models in Cover must take a Dangerous Terrain test after they move into Base Contact. If they have to Consolidate during the Melee, each Consolidating model must take a Dangerous Terrain test each time.

rules.name: Prescience
rules.fullDesc: For every 1000 points your force is allotted, you may redeploy 1 unit after Deployment but before Infiltrators are placed.

rules.name: Psychic Dependence
rules.fullDesc: If a model with Psychic Mastery Level # is slain, all friendly units within 6" must take a Pinning Test.

armyRules.name: Blind
armyRules.fullDesc: All charges against this model are considered Disorganized Charges.

armyRules.name: Exposed Transport
armyRules.fullDesc: For each Unsaved Glance or Penetration against this model, roll a d6. On a 4+ one Embarked model suffers 1 Mortal Wound instead. If there are no Embarked models, this model suffers damage like normal. In Melee, models Embarked on this one may fight as if they were not Embarked, and enemy units can target them in Melee as if they were not Embarked.

armyRules.name: Harlequin
armyRules.fullDesc: This model does not use the Craft World rules your army follows.

armyRules.name: Pheonix Lord
armyRules.fullDesc: This model has a 3+ Invulnerability Save.

armyRules.name: Wraith
armyRules.fullDesc: A keyword for denoting Wraith units.

armyRules.name: The Path of Command
armyRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, this model and target unit may reroll 1s To Hit.

armyRules.name: Inescapable Accuracy
armyRules.fullDesc: This model inflicts a -1 Cover Save against its attacks.

armyRules.name: Weapons Platform
armyRules.fullDesc: This model is considered to be a Monstrous Infantry for the purpose of Moving and Shooting or Shooting in Melee.

armyRules.name: Weapon Platform
armyRules.fullDesc: This model may move and shoot this weapon without penalty.

armyRules.name: Skyleap
armyRules.fullDesc: If this unit is not engaged in Melee it may go back into Reserves at the end of your Movement Phase.

armyRules.name: Unnatural Agility
armyRules.fullDesc: This model inflicts a -1 To Hit penalty when attacking it.

armyRules.name: Follower of Ynnead
armyRules.fullDesc: This model is not affected by your Craft World rules.

armyRules.name: Daemonic Avatar
armyRules.fullDesc: This model has a 4+ Invulnerability Save.

armyRules.name: Create Panic
armyRules.fullDesc: This model displaces all models when it moves, place them up to 1" Away. Immobile units prevent this model from moving there.

armyRules.name: Titanic God Engine
armyRules.fullDesc: This model may ignore all Non-Titanic models and Terrain for the purposes of Moving, Advancing, Falling Back, and Charging.

armyRules.name: God Engine
armyRules.fullDesc: This model may ignore all Monstrous Infantry, Infantry, and Swarms for the purposes of Moving, Advancing, Falling Back, and Charging.

armyRules.name: Warp Jump Generator
armyRules.fullDesc: This model ignores Terrain and models for Moving, Advancing, Charging, and Falling Back. This model may choose to move up to +2d6" instead of its normal Movement in the Movement Phase. If it does so, the unit makes a Dangerous Terrain Test.

profiles.rules: This model ignores Terrain and Models for the purposes of Moving, Advancing, Charging, and Falling Back.
This model is immune to Perils of the Warp.
This model may treat Crew Stun as Weapon Disabled results.
This model may Pivot immediately after resolving Shooting attacks in your Shooting Phase.

This model ignores Terrain and models for Moving, Advancing, Charging, and Falling Back. This model may choose to move up to +2d6" instead of its normal Movement in the Movement Phase. If it does so, the unit makes a Dangerous Terrain Test.
This model's unit gains a 5+ Invulnerability Save.
Each weapon in the squad with this rule may choose to join fire with another of its kind. For each weapon joining together, the lead designated weapon gains Range+6, S+1, and Heavy +1.
Cast 8+. Target unit may reroll all failed Saves (Feel No Pains are not Saves) until your next Psychic Phase.

commonWargear.name: Pulse Laser and Plasma Missile Launcher

profiles.rules: Heavy 1, 7" Blast, Destroyer, Monsterbane, Distortion Rift
Heavy 1, 10" Blast, Destroyer, Monsterbane, Spatial Rift

commonWargear.name: Phantom Glaive and 2 Linked Pulse Lasers

profiles.rules: Heavy 1 x2, 3" Blast, Ignores Cover, Pinning

jetbike.label: Jetbike
jetbike.note: M+4, T+1, W+1; gain Steed, Deepstrike, Fly, Very Bulky.

runes-of-fate.name: Force Lightning
runes-of-fate.description: Target unit suffers Assault 4, Tesla hits at S5, AP-.

runes-of-fate.name: Horrify
runes-of-fate.description: Target unit must cancel an ongoing friendly Aura of their choice.

runes-of-fate.name: Quicken and Restrain
runes-of-fate.description: Target unit may reroll failed Charges until your next Psychic Phase. Target unit moves at half speed in the Movement Phase until your next Psychic Phase.

runes-of-fate.name: Conceal and Reveal
runes-of-fate.description: Target unit gains Stealth until your next Psychic Phase. Target unit suffers -1 to Cover Saves until your next Psychic Phase.

runes-of-fate.name: Impair Senses
runes-of-fate.description: Place a 10" Blast Template to represent an Impairing Cloud. Any non-Eldar (Dark Eldar are still affected) shooting in to, out of, or through this cloud suffers -1 To Hit and +1 to the distance Scattered for Blast Templates. Remove at the start of your next Psychic Phase.

runes-of-fate.name: Enhance and Drain
runes-of-fate.description: Target unit gains +1 To Hit in Melee until your next Psychic Phase. Target NonTitanic unit suffers -1 To Hit in Melee until your next Psychic Phase.

shadowseer-spells.name: Twilight Pathways
shadowseer-spells.description: Target unit may reroll failed Charges until your next Psychic Phase.

shadowseer-spells.name: Mirror of Minds
shadowseer-spells.description: Target one model. Both models roll a d6 and add their Ld to it. If this model's score is higher, target model suffers 2 Mortal Wounds.

shadowseer-spells.name: Shard of Light
shadowseer-spells.description: Target nonTitanic unit suffers -1 To Hit until your next Psychic Phase.

shadowseer-spells.name: Veil of Tears
shadowseer-spells.description: Target unit gains a 4+ Cover Save until your next Psychic Phase.

shadowseer-spells.name: Webway Dance
shadowseer-spells.description: Target friendly unit with Deepstrike or Outflank is placed back in Reserves.

options.label: Swap one Shuriken Pistol for ranged weapon
Swap any Shuriken Pistol for pistol upgrade
Swap any Shuriken Pistol for melee weapon
Swooping Hawk Wings
options.note: M+4, gain Deepstrike, Flying. May return to Reserves at end of Movement Phase if not in Melee.

inlineRules.name: Communion with the Dead
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, target Wraith unit gains 5+ Feel No Pain.

inlineRules.name: Choreographer of War
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, this model and target unit may reroll all failed To Wound rolls in Melee.

inlineRules.name: Autarch of Mymeara
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, this model and target unit may move d6" after Shooting in the Shooting Phase.

inlineRules.name: Cursed
inlineRules.fullDesc: Saves of natural 6s this model makes against Melee attacks must be rerolled.

inlineRules.name: Reckless Tactics
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, this model and target unit gain Counterattack.

inlineRules.name: Daemonic Thirst
inlineRules.fullDesc: A weapon with this rule inflicts a Mortal Wound on its bearer in each of your Command Phases if you did not cause a Wound with the weapon during the last Turn. This does not trigger on Turn 1. If you roll a 1 for Extra Attack you may make no attacks this Melee phase and suffer 1 Mortal Wound.

inlineRules.name: Herald of Ynnead
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, this model and target unit may reroll 1s To Hit and Wound.

inlineRules.name: Bonesing
inlineRules.fullDesc: 12" Aura, target Vehicle or Wraith model Repairs or Heals 1 Wound. Roll a d6, on a 5+ restore secondary service from a Vehicle Penetration Result, but not the additional lost Wounds.

inlineRules.name: Jester of Death
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, target unit must take a Fear Test.

inlineRules.name: Role of Slaanesh
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model cannot join units and may not be targeted by any Auras. This model may reroll failed Charge rolls.

inlineRules.name: Master of Pathfinders
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, this model and target unit may reroll 1s To Wound with ranged attacks.

inlineRules.name: Sharpshot
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model may reroll all failed To Hit rolls with ranged attacks.

inlineRules.name: Champion of Ynnead
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, this model and target unit gains a 5+ Feel No Pain.

inlineRules.name: Warden of Yvraine
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model gains Bodyguard, but only for the purpose of taking damage for Yvraine.

inlineRules.name: Protectors
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model Overwatches on a 5+. With Pistols it Overwatches on a 4+.

inlineRules.name: Weapons Platform
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model is considered to be a Monstrous Infantry for the purpose of Moving and Shooting or Shooting in Melee.

options.label: Any model: swap Shuriken Pistol for
Any model: swap Harlequin's Blade for

inlineRules.name: Shield Generator
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, target unit gains a 5+ Invulnerability Save.

options.label: Up to 2 Guardians: swap Shuriken Pistol for special weapon
Any Warrior: swap Dual Ghost Swords for

inlineRules.name: Fear
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, target unit must take a Fear Test. This is cast as a unit.

options.label: Exarch: swap any Shuriken Pistol for

inlineRules.name: Pinpoint Marksman
inlineRules.fullDesc: Enemy units must reroll successful Saves from Ranged Attacks from this model.

inlineRules.name: Ghostlight
inlineRules.fullDesc: Each weapon in the squad with this rule may choose to join fire with another of its kind. For each weapon joining together, the lead designated weapon gains Range+6, S+1, and Heavy +1.

options.label: Exarch: swap any Shuriken Pistol for

inlineRules.name: Aerobatic Grace
inlineRules.fullDesc: 4+ Cover Save.

options.label: Any model: swap Haywire Cannon for
Any model: swap 2 Linked Shuriken Catapults for
Any model: swap 2 Linked Shuriken Catapults for

inlineRules.name: Linked Fire
inlineRules.fullDesc: Any other Prism Cannon within weapons range and Line of Sight to this Prism Cannon may give up its shot to add S+2 Heavy +1 to this Prism Cannon. If the S hits 13+ instead make it Destroyer.

options.label: Any model: swap Pulse Laser and Starcannon for

choices.label: Pulse Laser and Plasma Missile Launcher

options.label: Any model: swap 2 Linked Shuriken Catapults for
Any model: swap Haywire Cannon (primary) for
Any model: swap 2 Linked Shuriken Catapults for

inlineRules.name: Mindshock Probes
inlineRules.fullDesc: 12" Aura, target unit suffers Ld-2. Cast per model instead of per unit.

options.label: Any model: swap Pulse Laser for
Any model: swap 2 Linked Pheonix Missile Launchers for

inlineRules.name: Defense Tactics
inlineRules.fullDesc: 12" True Aura, all Eldar Troop Slots may shoot as if not engaged in Melee so long as they target units within their Melee range.

inlineRules.name: The Path of the Warrior
inlineRules.fullDesc: 12" True Aura, this model and all Dire Avenger units Overwatch on 4+, or 3+ if using Pistols.

inlineRules.name: Hand of Asuryan
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, target unit gain 5+ Feel No Pain.

inlineRules.name: Baharroth's Tempest
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, this model and target Swooping Hawks gain Hit and Run. All Swooping Hawks gain Pinning on Ranged Attacks.

inlineRules.name: First to Master Flight
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model and its unit do not Scatter when Deepstriking.

inlineRules.name: Assured Destruction
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, this model and target Fire Dragons gain +1 on Vehicle Damage Tables.

inlineRules.name: Unquenchable Resolve
inlineRules.fullDesc: For each unsaved Wound this model suffers, it gains S+1 and A+1. It cannot Heal from any source.

inlineRules.name: Banshee Howl
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, this model and target Howling Banshees roll 3d6 when determining Charge Distance, but cannot exceed 12".

inlineRules.name: Duelist
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model may choose the target of its Challenge. The target may not deny the Challenge. While in a Challenge, this model may reroll all failed To Hit and Wound rolls.

inlineRules.name: Hunter's Strike
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, this model and target Striking Scorpions gain Scout.

inlineRules.name: Microrift
inlineRules.fullDesc: One friendly unit per Round in Reserve may emerge from Reserves within 6" of this model as if they had emerged from a Webway Gate.

inlineRules.name: Pushing the Warp Boundaries
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, this model and target Warp Spiders may reroll all of the Warp Jump Generator dice.

inlineRules.name: Manufactured Death
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, this model and target Dark Reapers force targets to reroll successful cover saves with their attacks.

inlineRules.name: Khaine Awakened
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, this model and target unit gain Counterattack, Fearless, Furious Charge, and Shock Assault.

inlineRules.name: Molten Body
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model cannot be affected by Flame, Melta, or Beam weapons.

inlineRules.name: Avatar of Ynnead
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" True Aura, for each model slain, friend or foe, this model rolls a d6. On a 4+ it gains +1 Wound, even if it exceeds its starting Wound count.

inlineRules.name: Death Avatar
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, target unit must take a Fear Test.

inlineRules.name: Distortion Rift
inlineRules.fullDesc: Each time after resolving where the Template lands, place a 7" Crater that is Dangerous Terrain for the remainder of the game. Snap Shots and Overwatch do not place Craters.

inlineRules.name: Create Panic
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model displaces all models when it moves, place them up to 1" Away. Immobile units prevent this model from moving there.

inlineRules.name: Titanic God Engine
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model may ignore all Non-Titanic models and Terrain for the purposes of Moving, Advancing, Falling Back, and Charging.

inlineRules.name: Spatial Rift
inlineRules.fullDesc: Each time after resolving where the Template lands, place a 10" Crater that is Dangerous Terrain for the remainder of the game. Snap Shots and Overwatch do not place Craters.

inlineRules.fullDesc: This model may ignore all Monstrous Infantry, Infantry, and Swarms for the purposes of Moving, Advancing, Falling Back, and Charging.

inlineRules.name: Webway
inlineRules.fullDesc: Any friendly unit may arrive from Reserve as if it had Disembarked from the Webway Gate instead of normal. Access is on the Front and Back.
